subtitle: Care for Moonlight the magical girl
shortDescription: Raise Moonlight through 5 magical stages in her enchanted house. Feed, cuddle, and explore every room.
fullDescription:
Welcome to the Moonlight Magic House — a cosy corner of the world where moonbeams pool on the floor and magic hides in every drawer.

Moonlight is a small magical girl who lives inside an enchanted house full of secrets. She needs you: to feed her, cuddle her, send her to sleep at the right hour, and explore the house together.

Watch her grow through five stages — from tiny Moonbud to the all-knowing Moonkeeper — as new rooms unlock, new stories appear in the Library, and her outfit collection fills the wardrobe.

✨ FEATURES
• Real-time care: Moonlight's wonder, warmth, rest, magic, and hunger shift throughout the day
• 5 stages of evolution: Moonbud → Starling → Luminary → Sorceress → Moonkeeper
• 5 explorable rooms: Living Room, Kitchen, Bedroom, Garden, Library
• Library story books — 10 chapters that unlock as Moonlight grows
• Wardrobe with 8 outfits + seasonal exclusives
• House secrets: hidden interactions that reward coins and magic
• 8 learnable tricks — each one a small ceremony
• Seasonal events: Halloween, Winter, Spring, Summer
• Ambient music crafted for each room
• No ads. No loot boxes. Just Moonlight.
